title: Rhynchostylis retusa
taxonomy: Rhynchostylis retusa is classified as a type of orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. This species is native to Asia and is often cultivated for its unique, funnel-shaped flowers. Rhynchostylis retusa is further classified as a member of the genus Rhynchostylis, which is a group of epiphytic orchids. The plant is also known to be a part of the subtribe Coelogyneinae, within the tribe Coelogyneae. Rhynchostylis retusa is a popular choice among orchid enthusiasts due to its striking appearance and relatively easy cultivation.
